title: Emissive Andesite Border
description: A resource pack that gives Andesite an emissive border because of Create
body:
A simple resource pack that changes only one block. Andesite.
You might be wondering, "why the hell Andesite of all things?"
And that would be cause of [Andesite Alloys](https://breezewiki.com/create/wiki/Andesite_Alloy) in [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) basically being the one thing used for making pretty much any contraption, particularly being used to create [Shafts](https://breezewiki.com/create/wiki/Shaft), which are majorly important for practically everything.
And sometimes Andesite can blend in with Stone! Yucky, useless Stone. Hard to spot it down in the caves if you aren't looking REAL closely.
So, why not make Andesite incredibly easy to spot?
![An image of a Minecraft cliff showing Andesite with a glowing yellow border, using the Make Up UltraFast shaders.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/12Re81LQ/images/9f4fc816119a3cf51231aa7966d0f873176a5828.png)
Due to it being Emissive, something like [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home) or something like [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) is required. Personally, I recommend using the [Fabulously Optimized modpack.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
Also, the border is Brass colored. Just cause I thought it looked cool.
